timeline.title: Embedded Systems Intern
timeline.detail: Developed and tested firmware for a sensor array, reducing power draw by 18%.

timeline.title: FPGA-based DSP Research Assistant
timeline.detail: Implemented a pipelined FIR filter on FPGA, published findings in a departmental symposium.

timeline.title: Hackathon Winner
timeline.detail: First place among 40 teams for a rapid embedded-systems prototype.

timeline.title: Technical Lead, Robotics Club
timeline.detail: Leading a team of 12 on FPGA and embedded projects; organized 3 workshops.
